zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Lanphere於1687年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利時，她的父親George Lanphere56歲，母親Jane Hulet44歲。她於1708年3月21日與James Hope Covey Sr在美國羅得島華盛頓維斯特利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1726年4月27日在她的家鄉享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Lanphere于1687年3月1日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德金斯維斯特利时，她的父亲George Lanphere56岁，母亲Jane Hulet44岁。她于1708年3月21日与James Hope Covey Sr在美国罗德岛州華盛頓維斯特利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1726年4月27日在她的家乡享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lanphere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Lanfear  .

variants.name: Lanfear
meanings: Welsh and English: habitational name from any of the many places in Wales called Llanfair ‘church of Saint Mary’, from Welsh llan ‘church’ + Mair ‘Mary’, for example Llanfair Caereinion (Montgomeryshire). Compare Lamphear , Lamphere , Lamphier , Lanfair , Lanphear , Lanpher , Lanphere , and Lanphier .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Lanphere was born on 1 March 1687, in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, her father, George Lanphere, was 56 and her mother, Jane Hulet, was 44. She married James Hope Covey Sr on 21 March 1708, in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 April 1726, in her hometown, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Lanphere est née le 1 mars 1687, à Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Lanphere, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Jane Hulet, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé James Hope Covey Sr le 21 mars 1708, à Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1726, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Lanphere am 1. März 1687 in Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Lanphere 56 und ihre Mutter Jane Hulet 44. Sie hat am 21. März 1708 in Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten James Hope Covey Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. April 1726 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Lanphere è nata il il 1 marzo 1687 nel Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, sua padre, George Lanphere, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Jane Hulet, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato James Hope Covey Sr il 21 marzo 1708, nel Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1726, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Lanphereが1687年3月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドキングズウエステルリーで生まれた時，父George Lanphereは56歳，母Jane Huletは44歳であった。1708年3月21日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ワシュイントンウエステルリーでJames Hope Covey Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1726年4月27日に故郷で39歳で死去した。

ko.Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리
ko.Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리
ko.East Greenwich, Kent, Rhode Island, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 켄트 이스트 그린위치
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Lanphere(이)가 1687년 3월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 킨그스 웨스털리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Lanphere(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Hulet(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1708년 3월 21일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 와신그턴 웨스털리에서 James Hope Covey Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1726년 4월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 March 1687–27 April 1726: 1 de março de 1687–27 de abril de 1726
pt.Rhode Island, United States: Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Lanphere nasceu em 1 de março de 1687, em Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Lanphere, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hulet, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com James Hope Covey Sr em 21 de março de 1708, em Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1726, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Lanphere родилась 1 марта 1687 г. в местности вестирли, кингс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Lanphere было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hulet, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Hope Covey Sr 21 марта 1708 г. в местности вестирли, вашингтон, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 апреля 1726 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Lanphere nació el 1 de marzo de 1687, en Westerly, Kings, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, su papá, George Lanphere, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Jane Hulet, tenía 44 años. Se casó con James Hope Covey Sr el 21 de marzo de 1708, en Westerly, Washington, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1726, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años.
